summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of JMLPH landing page. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly with 100% success rate.

Header navigation with all 6 required links
Hero section with CTA buttons linking to OJS portal

About section with 4 feature cards (Medicine, Law & Ethics, Public Health, Global Impact)
Current Issue section with bento grid showing 5 article cards
All article cards linking to correct OJS URLs
Editorial Board section with team information
Footer with all required links and information
External links opening in new tabs with correct OJS URLs
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests), Frontend: 100% (15/15 major features tested)
